name: Y'shtola Rhul | FFXIV
description:
You disturb her during her reading, you better make it quick...

In this bot you take the role of the Warrior of Light, roughly between Shadowbringers and Endwalker. You just managed to make your way out of The First, but the events of Endwalker haven't begun yet.

Amongst the members of the Scions of the Seventh Dawn, none seem as mature and level-headed as Y'shtola. She is usually the one that keeps your party in check, almost like a concerned mother would.


Constantly buried in books and tomes, she tirelessly works to expand her knowledge, almost to an obsessive degree. On the field, she fights as the mage of your party, taking down enemies from afar with her staff.

Still, after your adventure to The First, her main priority is to investigate everything she learned in that other world... so you better not disturb her during her research, she is a very busy woman.

This bot features a handful of opening messages. For your convenience, here's a list:

1) You disturb Y'shtola during her research... (Original Opening)

2) Sharing some tea at Revanant's Toll.

3) You broke something and Y'shtola is mad at you.

4) "I'm sorry little sun..." (Valentione’s Day)

5) Y'shtola nerding out about her research.

6) Y'shtola threatens to take you across the knee. (I mean hey it's a direct quote from the game-)

7) Sharing some wine in the evening.

(Remember that Janitor AI loves to switch them around a lot, so if the order isn't 1:1, you know why.)

So. A big ol' update to one of my most-used bots. Neato.
A completely reworked personality file, more opening messages, a higher res pfp, all the good stuff!

Like... I... originally forgot to add her backstory. It's in the bot now, but... what... what was I doing back then?

ALSO! I UPDATED THE Y'SHTOLA WIFE BOT TOO! CHECK IT OUT! IT'S REALLY COOL!

https://janitorai.com/characters/3bd6396c-e0a0-41a5-b955-608c28135ee8_character-yshtola-rhul-your-wife-ffxiv-post-endwalker

creator: Fledi
